message:
feat(abi): add 27 Tier 3 symbols — wchar, pthread, splice, memfd, reallocarray

Broad expansion across multiple subsystems:
- Wide char: wcsnlen, wcswidth, wctob, btowc, wcrtomb, mbrtowc, mbsrtowcs,
  wcsrtombs, wcstol, wcstoul, wcstod
- Pthread: pthread_cancel, setcancelstate, setcanceltype, testcancel, getattr_np
- I/O (RawSyscall): splice, tee, vmsplice, memfd_create
- String: strsignal, psignal
- Stdlib: reallocarray, strtold, mkostemp
- Network: if_nametoindex, if_indextoname

Totals: 706 exported (387 Implemented, 187 RawSyscall, 132 GlibcCallThrough)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
